title: gladiolus somalensis
intro: Gladiolus somalensis, also known as the Somali gladiolus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It is primarily found in East Africa, particularly in Somalia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its roots, which contain saponins that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gladiolus somalensis include its potential use in treating various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and it can be prepared into herbal preparations like infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
